name: Aloe Soothing Mask
description: Infused with pure aloe vera extract, this soothing sheet mask calms redness, reduces irritation, and delivers a rush of cool hydration. Perfect after sun exposure or whenever your skin needs a gentle reset.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Pearl Purifying Mask
description: Powered by pearl extract and niacinamide, this luminescence mask brightens dull skin and minimizes pores. Pearl powder has been used for centuries to achieve a porcelain, lit-from-within glow.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Collagen Lifting Mask
description: Drench your skin in hydrolyzed collagen peptides that visibly firm, plump, and smooth fine lines. This deeply moisturizing mask restores skin's elasticity and leaves it feeling bouncy and youthful.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Seaweed Balancing Mask
description: Harvested from the deep ocean, seaweed extract is rich in minerals that balance oil production and deeply purify pores. This mask mattifies shine, tightens pores, and leaves oily and combination skin feeling fresh.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Blueberry Revitalizing Mask
description: Bursting with blueberry antioxidants, this revitalizing mask fights free radicals, reduces oxidative stress, and brings tired skin back to life. The result: refreshed, energized skin with a healthy berry-bright glow.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Hydrating Mask
description: Triple-weight hyaluronic acid floods every layer of the skin with intense moisture, leaving it visibly plumper and smoother after just one use. This is the ultimate hydration boost for dehydrated, parched skin.
howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Lemon Glowing Mask

howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Honey Nourishing Mask

howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Chamomile Calming Mask

howToUse: Cleanse face. Apply mask and leave on 15–20 min. Remove and pat remaining essence in. No rinsing needed.

name: Rose Rejuvenating Mask

name: Pomegranate Firming Mask
tagline: Nature's Red Jewel for Your Skin
description: Pomegranate extract is nature's most powerful firming antioxidant, packed with punicalagins that boost collagen synthesis and fight signs of aging. This mask visibly firms, lifts, and leaves skin with a jewel-like luminosity.
